behaviors.behavior: AC1 - GradeInputs.diff_coverage_percent optional, default None => Test-Health byte-identical (repo-agnostic neutral default)
AC2 - Test-Health blend: below 80% => x0.85 floored; at/above threshold or None => unchanged; documented constants
AC3 - floor invariant: never collapses a >=0.5 suite, no extra penalty on an already-collapsed one; not a _grade_gate collapse pillar / no headline F-cap
AC4 - WARN detail text below threshold (.1f, no boundary contradiction) + existing gap marker renders on the dashboard
AC5 - adapter gradeable_diff_percent strict-validates (ok->float, n/a/None/bool/str/NaN/inf/oob/huge-int->None) and build_grade_inputs wires the transient onto the field
AC6 - repo-agnostic grader never sets diff_coverage_percent => GradeReport identical to pre-Phase-3 (grade-neutral)
AC7 - TDD tests present and green (dedicated engine + adapter + grader modules)
behaviors.evidence: test_control_grade_diff_coverage.py (10) + test_diff_coverage_block.py additions + test_signal_bundle.py addition; full compliance 951 + grade 266 green

behaviors.behavior: AC8 - finalization preserves the tracked coverage.total (W4 signal) verbatim across the F5 rewrite
behaviors.evidence: guarded by shared/tests/test_coverage_baseline_lit.py::test_w4_is_green_on_committed_files (W4 CI gate FAILs if coverage.total is dropped)
